zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland於1214年1月出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德時，他的父親Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland45歲，母親Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus40歲。他於1239年與Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness在蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1283年6月16日在他的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland于1214年1月出生在苏格兰艾斯爾登東納爾德时，他的父亲Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland45岁，母亲Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus40岁。他于1239年与Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness在苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1283年6月16日在他的家乡享年69岁，埋葬在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland was born in January 1214, in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, was 45 and his mother, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, was 40. He married Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness in 1239, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 16 June 1283, in his hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland est né en janvier 1214, à Dundonald, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness en 1239, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 16 juin 1283, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland im Januar 1214 in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland 45 und seine Mutter Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus 40. Er hat 1239 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Juni 1283 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland è nato il nel gennaio 1214 nel Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness nel 1239, nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 giugno 1283, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotlandが1214年1月にスコットランドエイルシュアイアダンドナルドで生まれた時，父Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotlandは45歳，母Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angusは40歳であった。1239年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードでJean MacRory Countess Bute Marchionessと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1283年6月16日に故郷で69歳で死去し，スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーペイスリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland(이)가 1214년 1월 스컷랜드 에이르실르 던도널드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1239년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1283년 6월 16일 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland nasceu em janeiro de 1214, em Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness em 1239, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de junho de 1283, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland родился январь 1214 г. в местности дундональд, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness в 1239 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 16 июня 1283 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Stewart 4th High Steward Of Scotland nació en enero de 1214, en Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Walter Stewart 3rd High Steward of Scotland, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Jean MacRory Countess Bute Marchioness en 1239, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de junio de 1283, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland.
